summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Free POS System Program page at /free-pos-system completed. All 18 requested features passed including 12 sections, SEO meta tags, Clover Station Duo example cards ($119/mo, $30K+ volume, $0 effective cost), 7 FAQ questions with expand/collapse, 7 industry cards, internal links, Contact Sales modal, and Navigation dropdown link.

passed: H1 reads 'Get a Retail or Restaurant POS System with No Upfront Cost'
SEO: Page title contains 'Free POS System Program'
Hero has 'Contact Sales' and 'Book a 30-Minute Consultation' buttons
Trust line shows: Full Retail and Hospitality POS Systems, No Upfront Hardware Cost, Qualification-Based Program, Free Next Day Funding
Section 2: 'How the Free POS Program Works' with 4 numbered steps
Section 3: 'Example: Clover Station Duo Qualification' with 3 cards showing $119/mo, $30K+ volume, $0 effective cost
Section 4: 'Why This Program Works for Growing Businesses' with 4 benefits
Section 5: 'Qualification Requirements' with 5 factors and $10K+ callout
Section 6: 'If You Know Your Business Does the Volume' dark purple gradient section with 'See If You Qualify' button
Section 7: 'Industries That Benefit from the Free POS Program' with 7 industry cards
Section 8: 'What You Get with a Clover POS System' with 6 features and link to Clover POS page
Section 9: 'Why Businesses Choose Our POS Programs' with 5 benefits
Section 10: FAQ with 7 questions that expand/collapse on click
Section 11: Final CTA 'See If Your Business Qualifies for a Free POS System'
Internal links: POS Systems Overview, Clover POS System, Payment Processing Pricing, Restaurant POS, Payment Terminals
Contact Sales button opens LeadConnector form modal with iframe
Modal closes when close button clicked
Navigation: Pricing dropdown shows 'Free POS Program' linking to /free-pos-system

critical_code_review_comments: FreePOSProgram.jsx well-structured at 479 lines with proper component organization
FAQ JSON-LD schema correctly formatted with all 7 questions matching visible FAQ section
Calendly integration properly loads CSS and JS dynamically on mount
FAQItem component uses proper schema.org microdata (itemScope, itemProp) for SEO rich snippets
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for robust automated testing
Internal links use React Router Link components for SPA navigation
Modal implementation includes backdrop blur, click-outside-to-close, and close button
LeadConnector form loaded via iframe as expected
Clover Station Duo example uses 3 cards with proper color-coding (purple/blue/emerald)
Navigation.jsx correctly updated with 'Free POS Program' in Pricing dropdown
Dark purple gradient section (Section 6) has correct styling: bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-900 via-purple-800 to-blue-900
seed_data_creation: N/A - static content page with no API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Free POS System Program page at /free-pos-system fully tested. All 12 sections present with correct headings, content structure, and interactive elements. SEO features verified: title contains 'Free POS System Program', meta description, keywords, canonical URL, and FAQ JSON-LD schema with 7 questions. Clover Station Duo example shows $119/mo subscription, $30K+ volume requirement, $0 effective cost after 30 days via 3 cards. Section 6 (confident businesses) has dark purple gradient background with 'See If You Qualify' button. 7 industry cards: Restaurants, Bars, Coffee Shops, Retail Stores, Salons & Spas, Quick-Service Restaurants, Service Businesses. FAQ expand/collapse works for all 7 questions. Contact Sales modal opens LeadConnector iframe form and closes properly. Calendly integration for 'Book a 30-Minute Consultation' button configured. Navigation Pricing dropdown includes 'Free POS Program' link. All data-testid attributes present for testing.
